data.title: Emporia Research Enhances Healthcare Targeting Capabilities, Leveraging Definitive Healthcare Data and Insights
data.description: Today, in Austin, Texas, Emporia Research, a renowned B2B research participant recruitment company, revealed their upgraded healthcare targeting capabilities, achieved through a partnership with Definitive Healthcare, a top provider of healthcare market data. This collaboration aims to improve the precision and effectiveness of their services. The announcement was made on April 10, 2026.

data.title: HUBG SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Hub Group
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Hub Group to reach out to him for a discussion on potential options. If you have suffered notable losses in Hub Group stock or options and are interested in exploring legal avenues, Wilson encourages you to contact him directly.

data.title: Inspira Enters Quantum Computing Sector, Targeting a Critical Connectivity Bottleneck with Newly Acquired AME Platform
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IINN, based in Ra'anana, Israel, has disclosed its launch into the quantum computing industry. The focus of this move is to address a significant connectivity issue by utilizing its newly obtained additive manufactured electronics (AME) platform to develop a pioneering 3D structure for systems operating within dilution cryostats. This strategic shift positions the company to delve into cutting-edge technology and make noteworthy advancements in the field.
Nano Dimension sells AME and Fabrica product lines.

data.description: The Company has acquired intellectual property, customer-related assets, and commercial operations in a transaction that sets the stage for its next strategic phase.

data.title: Penetration Testing as a Service (PTaaS) Market worth $1.98 billion by 2031 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals significant growth projections for the Penetration Testing as a Service (PTaaS) Market. The market is expected to increase from USD 0.72 billion in 2026 to USD 1.98 billion by 2031. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.6% over the forecast period.
